'''rafuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagopathy|oesophagopathy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagopathy|oesophagopathy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rafuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræfichith|ræfichith]] || [[word:ræfichij|ræfichij]] || [[word:ræfichish|ræfichish]] || [[word:ræfichi|ræfichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafufuchuth|rafufuchuth]] || [[word:rafufuchuj|rafufuchuj]] || [[word:rafufuchush|rafufuchush]] || [[word:rafufuchu|rafufuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafuchuth|rafuchuth]] || [[word:rafuchuj|rafuchuj]] || [[word:rafuchush|rafuchush]] || [[word:rafuchu|rafuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafufchuth|rafufchuth]] || [[word:rafufchuj|rafufchuj]] || [[word:rafufchush|rafufchush]] || [[word:rafufchuf|rafufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rafuchuthu|rafuchuthu]] || [[word:rafuchuju|rafuchuju]] || [[word:rafuchushu|rafuchushu]] || [[word:rafuchuku|rafuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rafuchuth|rafuchuth]] || [[word:rafuchuj|rafuchuj]] || [[word:rafuchush|rafuchush]] || [[word:rafuchu|rafuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rafuchuthul|rafuchuthul]] || [[word:rafuchujul|rafuchujul]] || [[word:rafuchushul|rafuchushul]] || [[word:rafuchukul|rafuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rafuchuthuthu|rafuchuthuthu]] || [[word:rafuchujuju|rafuchujuju]] || [[word:rafuchushushu|rafuchushushu]] || [[word:rafuchuku|rafuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rafuchuthun|rafuchuthun]] || [[word:rafuchujun|rafuchujun]] || [[word:rafuchushun|rafuchushun]] || [[word:rafuchukun|rafuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rafuchuthuoro|rafuchuthuoro]] || [[word:rafuchujuoro|rafuchujuoro]] || [[word:rafuchushuoro|rafuchushuoro]] || [[word:rafuchukuoro|rafuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
